name: NEXTERA ENERGY INC
summary: NextEra Energy Inc (NEE) is an energy company engaged in the generation, transmission, distribution, and sale of electric energy. It operates through subsidiaries including Florida Power & Light Company, a regulated electric utility, and NextEra Energy Resources, which develops and operates clean energy projects including wind, solar, and battery storage across North America.

products.name: Electric generation and distribution
products.description: Regulated electric utility services provided through Florida Power & Light Company

products.name: Wind energy
products.description: Clean energy generation from wind projects operated by NextEra Energy Resources

products.name: Solar energy
products.description: Clean energy generation from solar projects operated by NextEra Energy Resources

products.name: Battery storage
products.description: Energy storage solutions developed and operated by NextEra Energy Resources
